  pal3: $0F $0F $0F $0F

  bgpal1: $0F $18 $28 $11

=== DUMP 39 bf=1290 mode=$70 ===
-- sprite palettes --

=== DUMP 40 bf=1320 mode=$70 ===
  spr00: x=112 y=108 tile=$04 attr=$00 pal=0
  spr01: x=120 y=108 tile=$05 attr=$00 pal=0
  spr02: x=112 y=116 tile=$06 attr=$01 pal=1
  spr03: x=120 y=116 tile=$07 attr=$01 pal=1
-- sprite palettes --
  pal0: $0F $0F $16 $30
  pal1: $1A $0F $15 $30
  pal2: $1A $0F $15 $36
  pal3: $1A $0F $27 $30
-- bg palettes --
  bgpal0: $0F $07 $17 $28
  bgpal1: $1A $08 $18 $28
  bgpal2: $1A $12 $22 $31
  bgpal3: $1A $00 $02 $30
